form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at Kempton Park All Weather on March 2 over 1400m, nose behind Lady Dora Mae with 55.5kg at $7.50. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on January 19 over 1200m, 1.5 len behind Up The Agenda carrying 58kg at $13. Made headway last time. Top chance.
